theme: Pick a team that clicks but does not crowd
title: Pick a Team That Clicks But Does Not Crowd
seed_problem: subset selection with pairwise synergy bonuses on a graph
mutation: composite: couple supermodular pairwise synergy (chemistry edges realized only when both endpoints are chosen) with an anti-coordination crowding penalty charged PER selected node against how many of ITS selected neighbours it has beyond a personal cap -- because adding one node retroactively raises the crowd charge of every already-chosen neighbour, the objective is neither sub- nor supermodular and a myopic per-node marginal-gain greedy that omits this externality overshoots into overcrowded cliques.
innovation_hook: Combining pairwise synergy with a crowding penalty makes the objective neither sub- nor super-modular, breaking greedy's guarantee.
strategies: trivial: select exactly the zero-degree (no-chemistry-edge) candidates -- always safe, reproduces the checker baseline B exactly -> ratio 0.1

greedy (the trap): repeated per-node marginal-gain forward selection -- for each unselected candidate k, score(k) = v_k + synergy(k, current team) - pen_k*max(0, deg(k)-cap_k) using ONLY k's own crowd charge, add the best-scoring positive candidate, repeat. This omits the externality: adding k also raises deg_S(j) for every already-selected neighbour j of k, silently inflating THEIR crowd charge, which this local score never re-checks. It walks whole tight-cap cliques past their true optimum and can drive a cluster's realized value to zero.

strong (the insight): build with the same forward pass, then repeatedly run full-objective local search (try dropping each selected node, try swapping a selected node for an unselected one, evaluating the TRUE total F -- which correctly re-prices every neighbour's crowd charge) from several random restarts/orders, keeping the best full team found; this finds the interior crowd-respecting core of each clique instead of overshooting it.
invalid: emits an out-of-range / duplicate candidate index -> checker scores 0
